rationale: Review 2's strongest finding (the `notMem`/verbose suffix in `finrank_adjoin_simple_eq_two_of_sq_mem_notMem`) has some basis — Mathlib 4 convention uses `not_mem`, not `notMem` — but it is a minor stylistic point; the other two findings (renaming the `sup` lemma, inlining `rfl`) are contested preferences. Review 1 correctly approves; acting on Review 2's guidance would produce only a marginally different PR, well within the contested-preference threshold.
